title: Bharathidasan University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
shortInfo: Bharathidasan University has officially announced the Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 with 1 vacancy. The detailed notification was published on 18 May 2026 at Bharathidasan University Official Website. Candidates who meet the maximum age limit of 28 years and hold M.Sc. Physics qualification with minimum 55% marks/5.79 CGPA can submit their offline applications on or before 01 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and application form are shared below.

basic_details.job_title: Bharathidasan University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Bharathidasan University has officially announced the Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 with 1 vacancy. The detailed notification was published on 18 May 2026 at Bharathidasan University Official Website. Candidates who meet the maximum age limit of 28 years and hold M.Sc. Physics qualification with minimum 55% marks/5.79 CGPA can submit their offline applications on or before 01 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and application form are shared below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 28 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. Physics with minimum of 55% or 5.79 CGPA
qualification.details: Project Assistant: M.Sc. Physics with a minimum of 55% or 5.79 CGPA (Relaxation for SC/ST: 50% or 5.26 CGPA). Desired: Previous experience in solar cells research, Sound knowledge in lasers and nanophotonics. Candidates awaiting end semester project defense can also apply.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Bharathidasan University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 01-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Bharathidasan University Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Bharathidasan University Project Assistant position is 01-06-2026. Ensure your application reaches the university before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. in Physics with a minimum of 55% marks or 5.79 CGPA. SC/ST candidates are eligible with 50% marks or 5.26 CGPA.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Assistant post is 28 years. Age relaxation is provided for SC/ST candidates.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an age relaxation of 5 years for SC/ST candidates applying for the Project Assistant position.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000/- per month for the Project Assistant position.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the Bharathidasan University Project Assistant job?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it via post to the address specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant position at Bharathidasan University will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Are there any application fees for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there are no application fees mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Bharathidasan University Project Assistant recruitment is CMRG/eOffice E-671131/168.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Project Assistant position at Bharathidasan University is a contractual job.
